spaceflight.title: Astronauts ‘operate’ on space station’s broken robot arm
spaceflight.summary: On May 27, flight controllers at the Johnson Space Center in Houston noticed one of the Canadian-built arm's seven joints was drawing more current than expected and not moving properly.

spaceflight.title: Blue Origin outlines return to flight logistics for its New Glenn rockets
spaceflight.summary: The explosion of a New Glenn rocket on May 28 is still under investigation. The company said it’s moving to a hybrid horizontal-vertical integration for its rockets moving forward.
